summary: Fixed the Bash 3.2 nounset empty-array failure in the loop gate flow acceptance test. Verified the script now passes end-to-end.
filesChanged: test/loop/gate_flow_test.sh - made optional pi_args expansion safe when empty
raw:
## Completed
Fixed the Bash 3.2 `set -u` empty-array crash by using a nounset-safe array expansion for optional `pi_args`.

## Files Changed
- `test/loop/gate_flow_test.sh` - made `pi_args` expansion safe when no driver model is configured.

## How To Verify
`bash test/loop/gate_flow_test.sh`

## Notes
Verified locally: the gate flow test passes end-to-end.
